SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
WITH BaseMAO004Data AS(
  SELECT 
     m.ResponseMAO004ID
    ,CAST(m.MACONTRACTID AS string) AS planID	
    ,CAST(m.HICN AS string) AS BeneficiaryID	
    ,CAST(m.EncounterICN AS string) AS  EncounterICN  
    ,CAST(m.OrigEncounterICN AS string) AS OrigEncounterICN
    ,CAST(m.CLAIMTYPE AS string) AS ClaimTypeInd	
    ,TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(m.FromDOS, 'yyyyMMdd') AS TIMESTAMP)) AS ServiceFromdate	
    ,TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(m.THRUDOS, 'yyyyMMdd') AS TIMESTAMP)) AS ServiceTodate
    ,TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(m.PlanSubmissionDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS TIMESTAMP)) AS PlanSubmissionDate
    ,TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(m.TransactionDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS TIMESTAMP)) AS TransactionDate
    ,CAST(m.ICD AS string) AS ICDCodeType
    ,CAST(e.ClaimNumber AS string) AS ClaimNumber
    ,CAST(e.OriginalClaimNumber AS string) AS OriginalClaimNumber
    ,IFNULL(e.ProgramID,'') AS ProgramID
    ,IFNULL(e.ProjectID,'') AS ProjectID
    ,m.DX1
    ,m.DX2
    ,m.DX3
    ,m.DX4
    ,m.DX5
    ,m.DX6
    ,m.DX7
    ,m.DX8
    ,m.DX9
    ,m.DX10
    ,m.DX11
    ,m.DX12
    ,m.DX13
    ,m.DX14
    ,m.DX15
    ,m.DX16
    ,m.DX17
    ,m.DX18
    ,m.DX19
    ,m.DX20
    ,m.DX21
    ,m.DX22
    ,m.DX23
    ,m.DX24
    ,m.DX25
    ,m.DX26
    ,m.DX27
    ,m.DX28
    ,m.DX29
    ,m.DX30
    ,m.DX31
    ,m.DX32
    ,m.DX33
    ,m.DX34
    ,m.DX35
    ,m.DX36
    ,m.DX37
    ,m.DX38
    ,m.AD1
    ,m.AD2
    ,m.AD3
    ,m.AD4
    ,m.AD5
    ,m.AD6
    ,m.AD7
    ,m.AD8
    ,m.AD9
    ,m.AD10
    ,m.AD11
    ,m.AD12
    ,m.AD13
    ,m.AD14
    ,m.AD15
    ,m.AD16
    ,m.AD17
    ,m.AD18
    ,m.AD19
    ,m.AD20
    ,m.AD21
    ,m.AD22
    ,m.AD23
    ,m.AD24
    ,m.AD25
    ,m.AD26
    ,m.AD27
    ,m.AD28
    ,m.AD29
    ,m.AD30
    ,m.AD31
    ,m.AD32
    ,m.AD33
    ,m.AD34
    ,m.AD35
    ,m.AD36
    ,m.AD37
    ,m.AD38
    ,m.EncounterTypeSwitch
    ,m.DiagnosesRAStatus
  FROM ResponseMAO004 m
    LEFT JOIN ResponseMAO002 c  
      ON trim(m.EncounterICN) = trim(c.EncounterICN) 
      and trim(C.EncounterLineNumber)='000' 
    LEFT JOIN EDPSEncounterSubmission s 
      ON c.PlanCCNID = s.SubmittedClaimID
    LEFT JOIN EncounterClaimLevel e 
      ON s.EncounterClaimLevelID = e.EncounterClaimLevelID
  WHERE  
  CAST(LEFT(m.ThruDOS,4) AS int) BETWEEN YEAR(current_date()) - 3 and YEAR(current_date())
  AND 
  m.ClaimType IN ('I','O','P')
  ),
  ResponseMAO004Updated (
  SELECT DISTINCT
     a.ResponseMAO004ID
    ,a.planID
    ,a.BeneficiaryID
    ,a.EncounterICN
    ,a.OrigEncounterICN
    ,a.ClaimTypeInd
    ,a.ServiceFromdate
    ,a.ServiceTodate
    ,a.PlanSubmissionDate
    ,a.TransactionDate
    ,a.ICDCodeType
    ,a.ClaimNumber
    ,a.OriginalClaimNumber
    ,a.ProgramID
    ,a.ProjectID
  FROM BaseMAO004Data a 
    LEFT JOIN BaseMAO004Data b
      ON a.EncounterICN = b.OrigEncounterICN  
      AND b.EncounterTypeSwitch <> '4'
  WHERE 
  a.EncounterTypeSwitch <> '4' 
  AND 
  b.OrigEncounterICN IS NULL 
  AND 
  a.DiagnosesRAStatus = 'A'
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT 
     a.ResponseMAO004ID
    ,a.planID
    ,a.BeneficiaryID
    ,a.EncounterICN
    ,a.OrigEncounterICN
    ,a.ClaimTypeInd
    ,a.ServiceFromdate
    ,a.ServiceTodate
    ,a.PlanSubmissionDate
    ,a.TransactionDate
    ,a.ICDCodeType
    ,a.ClaimNumber
    ,a.OriginalClaimNumber
    ,a.ProgramID
    ,a.ProjectID
  FROM BaseMAO004Data  a 
    LEFT JOIN BaseMAO004Data  b 
      ON a.EncounterICN = b.OrigEncounterICN  
      AND b.EncounterTypeSwitch IN('4','5','6')
  WHERE 
  a.EncounterTypeSwitch IN('4','5','6')
  AND 
  b.OrigEncounterICN IS NULL 
  AND 
  a.DiagnosesRAStatus = 'A'
  ),
  MAO004Pivoted AS(
      SELECT 
        ResponseMAO004ID
       ,stack(38, 
           array(DX1,AD1)
          ,array(DX2,AD2)
          ,array(DX3,AD3)
          ,array(DX4,AD4)
          ,array(DX5,AD5)
          ,array(DX6,AD6)
          ,array(DX7,AD7)
          ,array(DX8,AD8)
          ,array(DX9,AD9)
          ,array(DX10,AD10)
          ,array(DX11,AD11)
          ,array(DX12,AD12)
          ,array(DX13,AD13)
          ,array(DX14,AD14)
          ,array(DX15,AD15)
          ,array(DX16,AD16)
          ,array(DX17,AD17)
          ,array(DX18,AD18)
          ,array(DX19,AD19)
          ,array(DX20,AD20)
          ,array(DX21,AD21)
          ,array(DX22,AD22)
          ,array(DX23,AD23)
          ,array(DX24,AD24)
          ,array(DX25,AD25)
          ,array(DX26,AD26)
          ,array(DX27,AD27)
          ,array(DX28,AD28)
          ,array(DX29,AD29)
          ,array(DX30,AD30)
          ,array(DX31,AD31)
          ,array(DX32,AD32)
          ,array(DX33,AD33)
          ,array(DX34,AD34)
          ,array(DX35,AD35)
          ,array(DX36,AD36)
          ,array(DX37,AD37)
          ,array(DX38,AD38)
               ) AS Unpivotcolumns
      FROM BaseMAO004Data
      ),
      ResponseMAO004Diagnosis AS(
      SELECT 
           ResponseMAO004ID
          ,trim(Unpivotcolumns[0]) AS Diags
          ,trim(Unpivotcolumns[1]) AS ADInd
      FROM MAO004Pivoted
      WHERE
      CASE 
        WHEN NULLIF(trim(Unpivotcolumns[0]),'') IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        WHEN NULLIF(trim(Unpivotcolumns[1]),'') IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 0 
      END = 1
      ),
      MAO004 AS(
  SELECT DISTINCT
     m.planID
    ,m.BeneficiaryID	
    ,m.EncounterICN	  
    ,m.OrigEncounterICN
    ,m.ClaimTypeInd
    ,m.ServiceFromdate	
    ,m.ServiceTodate
    ,m.PlanSubmissionDate
    ,m.TransactionDate
    ,m.ICDCodeType
    ,a.Diags as icd
    ,a.ADInd AS AddDeleteFlag
    ,m.ClaimNumber
    ,m.OriginalClaimNumber
    ,m.ProgramID
    ,m.ProjectID
  FROM ResponseMAO004Updated m
    INNER JOIN ResponseMAO004Diagnosis a
      ON m.ResponseMAO004ID = a.ResponseMAO004ID
  WHERE
  a.ADInd <> 'D' 
  AND 
  m.BeneficiaryID <> ''
  AND 
  IFNULL(m.planID, '') <> ''
  AND 
  IFNULL(m.EncounterICN, '') <> ''
  AND 
  IFNULL(m.BeneficiaryID, '') <> ''
  AND 
  IFNULL(m.ClaimTypeInd, '') <> ''
  AND 
  IFNULL(m.ServiceFromdate, '') <> ''
  AND 
  IFNULL(m.ServiceToDate, '') <> '' 
  AND 
  IFNULL(a.Diags, '') <> ''
  )
  SELECT  
   PlanID
  ,BeneficiaryID
  ,EncounterICN
  ,OrigEncounterICN
  ,ClaimTypeInd
  ,ServiceFromdate
  ,ServiceTodate
  ,PlanSubmissionDate
  ,TransactionDate
  ,ICDCodeType
  ,icd
  ,AddDeleteFlag
  ,ClaimNumber
  ,OriginalClaimNumber
  ,ProgramID
  ,ProjectID
  ,sha2(concat_ws("|"
               ,ifnull(PlanID,'')
               ,ifnull(BeneficiaryID,'')
               ,ifnull(EncounterICN,'')
               ,ifnull(ServiceFromdate,'')
               ,ifnull(ClaimTypeInd,'')
               ,ifnull(ServiceTodate,'')
               ,ifnull(icd,'')
    ),256) AS BusinessKeyHash
  FROM MAO004
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
select 1
from tempSQLScript
group by 
PlanID
,BeneficiaryID
,EncounterICN
,ClaimTypeInd
,ServiceFromdate
,ServiceTodate
,icd
having count(1) > 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
with Destination AS(
select 
   PlanID
  ,BeneficiaryID
  ,EncounterICN
  ,OrigEncounterICN
  ,ClaimTypeInd
  ,ServiceFromdate
  ,ServiceTodate
  ,PlanSubmissionDate
  ,TransactionDate
  ,ICDCodeType
  ,icd
  ,AddDeleteFlag
  ,ClaimNumber
  ,OriginalClaimNumber
  ,ProgramID
  ,ProjectID
  ,sha2(
    concat_ws("|"
               ,ifnull(PlanID, '')
               ,ifnull(BeneficiaryID,'')
               ,ifnull(EncounterICN,'')
               ,ifnull(ServiceFromdate,'')
               ,ifnull(ClaimTypeInd,'')
               ,ifnull(ServiceTodate,'')
               ,ifnull(icd,'')
    ),256
  ) AS BusinessKeyHash
FROM DestinationTable dt 
),
cte_data as (
select 
 ifnull(ss.PlanID,dt.PlanID) as PlanID
,ifnull(ss.BeneficiaryID,dt.BeneficiaryID) as BeneficiaryID
,ifnull(ss.EncounterICN,dt.EncounterICN) as EncounterICN
,ifnull(ss.OrigEncounterICN,dt.OrigEncounterICN) as OrigEncounterICN
,ifnull(ss.ClaimTypeInd,dt.ClaimTypeInd) as ClaimTypeInd
,ifnull(ss.ServiceFromdate,dt.ServiceFromdate) as ServiceFromdate
,ifnull(ss.ServiceTodate,dt.ServiceTodate) as ServiceTodate
,ifnull(ss.PlanSubmissionDate,dt.PlanSubmissionDate) as PlanSubmissionDate
,ifnull(ss.TransactionDate,dt.TransactionDate) as TransactionDate
,ifnull(ss.ICDCodeType,dt.ICDCodeType) as ICDCodeType
,ifnull(ss.icd,dt.icd) as icd
,ifnull(ss.AddDeleteFlag,dt.AddDeleteFlag) as AddDeleteFlag
,ifnull(ss.ClaimNumber,dt.ClaimNumber) as ClaimNumber
,ifnull(ss.OriginalClaimNumber,dt.OriginalClaimNumber) as OriginalClaimNumber
,ifnull(ss.ProgramID,dt.ProgramID) as ProgramID
,ifnull(ss.ProjectID,dt.ProjectID) as ProjectID
,case
      when ss.BusinessKeyHash = dt.BusinessKeyHash then 'update' --Join works update the record
      when dt.BusinessKeyHash IS NOT NULL AND ss.BusinessKeyHash IS NULL then 'delete'
      else 'insert' -- new record that did not exist before
 end as actioncode
FROM tempSQLScript ss
  FULL OUTER JOIN  Destination dt 
        ON ss.BusinessKeyHash = dt.BusinessKeyHash
)
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING (SELECT * from cte_data) s 
  ON  s.PlanID = t.PlanID 
  and s.EncounterICN = t.EncounterICN 
  and s.BeneficiaryID = t.BeneficiaryID  
  and s.ClaimTypeInd = t.ClaimTypeInd 
  and s.ServiceFromdate = t.ServiceFromdate 
  and s.ServiceTodate = t.ServiceTodate 
  and s.icd = t.icd
WHEN MATCHED  and actioncode = 'delete' THEN DELETE
WHEN MATCHED  and actioncode = 'update' THEN UPDATE
SET 
   t.OrigEncounterICN=s.OrigEncounterICN
  ,t.PlanSubmissionDate=s.PlanSubmissionDate
  ,t.TransactionDate=s.TransactionDate
  ,t.ICDCodeType=s.ICDCodeType
  ,t.AddDeleteFlag=s.AddDeleteFlag
  ,t.ClaimNumber=s.ClaimNumber
  ,t.OriginalClaimNumber=s.OriginalClaimNumber
  ,t.ProgramID=s.ProgramID
  ,t.ProjectID=s.ProjectID
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
 PlanID
,BeneficiaryID
,EncounterICN
,OrigEncounterICN
,ClaimTypeInd
,ServiceFromdate
,ServiceTodate
,PlanSubmissionDate
,TransactionDate
,ICDCodeType
,icd
,AddDeleteFlag
,ClaimNumber
,OriginalClaimNumber
,ProgramID
,ProjectID
) VALUES  (
 s.PlanID
,s.BeneficiaryID
,s.EncounterICN
,s.OrigEncounterICN
,s.ClaimTypeInd
,s.ServiceFromdate
,s.ServiceTodate
,s.PlanSubmissionDate
,s.TransactionDate
,s.ICDCodeType
,s.icd
,s.AddDeleteFlag
,s.ClaimNumber
,s.OriginalClaimNumber
,s.ProgramID
,s.ProjectID)
